steps.title: Storefront login as the new user
steps.note: On the storefront (:8080) the new user logs in with their email + password.

steps.title: Native plans — Choose your plan
steps.note: The native pricing page lists the software/plans, each with a price + "Choose Plan".

steps.title: Checkout the software
steps.note: Checkout for the chosen software (GHRM) — order summary + total, logged in as the buyer.

steps.title: Accept terms
steps.note: Agree to the Terms & Conditions — the activation button enables.

steps.title: Software activated
steps.note: Confirm — the subscription for the software is activated.
